objective: Bind the R17 portable OCI identity to the already-qualified Docker engine-local image identity so the VPS deploy renders an executable exact image reference without rebuilding or relabeling the runtime.
executable_blocker: The first P03 attempt verified and loaded carrier 46e12e35 but failed closed before service installation because P01 rendered portable identity e6db8ab as a Docker engine ID instead of qualified loaded identity d1f56e9.

boundary_contract.identity_source: F10 exact release evidence plus exact carrier load on bound VPS

acceptance_commands: rendered unit contains d1f56e9 and not e6db8ab
profile binds both identities and rejects omission or substitution
exact-head PR merge and receipt CI
stop_conditions: qualified engine identity cannot be reconciled to the exact carrier
runtime rebuild or relabel becomes necessary
frozen public contract break becomes necessary
rollback: Revert only P01-R3 control artifacts; preserve the exact staged image and immutable failed operational receipts.
